home.heroSubtitle: Compare padel rackets with real prices in Argentine pesos, full specs and an AI-powered finder that recommends based on your game.
home.featureCompareText: Normalized specs, prices across Argentine stores and price history, side by side.
home.featureFinderText: Tell us your level, style and budget: we recommend real rackets and explain why.
home.featurePricesText: Prices in pesos, local stock and direct store links. No Spanish catalogs.

meta.title: PaletaIQ — Find your perfect padel racket
